title: Scovia na Shangazi Kichimbakazi
description: Scovia can't go to school because she is menstruating.  A fairy auntie teaches her how to make re-useable menstrual pads (RUMPs) so that she can go to school.

pages.text: Hapo zamani, msichana aliyeitwa Scovia alianza siku zake za hedhi alipokuwa shuleni. Sketi yake ilichafuka. Wanafunzi walicheka. Alikimbilia nyumbani akiwa ameaibika.
Alipokuwa akifua sketi yake, alitamani angekuwa na pedi. Shangazi kichimbakazi akatokea akisema, "Nipo hapa kukusaidia urudi shuleni."
"Siwezi kwenda shule sasa!" alisema Scovia. Shangazi kichimbakazi akasema angemfundisha jinsi ya kutengeneza pedi zinazoweza kutumika zaidi ya mara moja.
Shangazi kichimbakazi akamwambia Scovia kumwomba jirani yake fundi cherehani vipande vya vitambaa kwa pesa kidogo. Halafu akampa Scovia pedi aliyoshona.

"Unaweza kutumia pedi mara nyingi. Badilisha pedi kila baada ya saa 3 mpaka 4. Ukishatumia loweka kwenye maji, fua kwa sabuni halafu anika juani. Inabidi sasa niende kuwasaidia wasichana wengine," alisema shangazi kichimbakazi.
